title: Clinical Conditions
description: Record your clinical conditions and health issues
descriptionDetail: Search for your conditions using SNOMED CT — the international clinical terminology standard. These are included in your International Patient Summary (IPS) export as the Problem List.
privacy: Your conditions are stored locally on this device and only included in the IPS when you export it.
noConditions: No clinical conditions recorded yet. Add your first condition to build your problem list.

form.title: Add a Clinical Condition
form.searchHint: Type at least 2 characters to search SNOMED CT clinical findings.
form.searchError: Could not reach the terminology server. Check your connection and try again.
form.noResults: No matching conditions found. Try different search terms.
form.onsetDateHint: When was this condition first diagnosed or noticed?
form.notesPlaceholder: Any additional details about this condition...
